title: Autumn Apple Crisp
description: A warm and comforting dessert featuring caramelized apples topped with a crunchy oat mixture.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sliced apples, flour, cinnamon, and salt. Toss until apples are evenly coated.
Transfer apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together oatmeal, brown sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Top apple mixture with the oat mixture, spreading evenly.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with caramelized apples.
